summary: Next.js Developer with 2.5+ years of experience building scalable ecommerce and dashboard web applications using React.js, Next.js, TypeScript, Redux, and Tailwind CSS. Strong understanding of SSR, CSR, SSG, ISG, and performance optimization techniques including code splitting, lazy loading, and caching. Experienced in REST API integrations, token-based authentication, and Agile Scrum development.

workExperiences.title: SDE-1 Frontend – Appscrip
responsibilities: Developed and maintained scalable multi-user ecommerce dashboard applications using Next.js (Page Router) and React functional components with hooks and TypeScript.
Implemented Server-Side Rendering (SSR), Client-Side Rendering (CSR), and Static Site Generation (SSG) strategies to improve SEO performance and reduce page load time by 30%.
Built responsive and reusable UI components using Tailwind CSS following modern CSS best practices, improving UI consistency by 25%.
Integrated REST APIs with token-based JWT authentication and role-based authorization, ensuring secure and scalable access control.
Applied performance optimization techniques such as code splitting, lazy loading, and caching, improving Core Web Vitals score by 20%.
Collaborated closely with backend teams to integrate REST APIs and optimize data flow across applications.
Utilized Redux and Zustand for efficient state management in complex user workflows.
Participated in code reviews, enforced best coding practices, and mentored junior developers to improve overall code quality.

workExperiences.title: Web Developer – Driver on Hire
responsibilities: Developed responsive UI components using React.js and Tailwind CSS for real-time driver booking workflows.
Integrated Google Places API, Mapbox, and REST APIs to enable dynamic geolocation-based features.
Implemented real-time FCM push notifications to enhance user engagement and reduce assignment delays by 15%.
Optimized frontend performance using lazy loading and efficient rendering techniques, improving application speed and cross-browser compatibility.
Ensured mobile-first responsive design and adherence to SEO best practices.

technicalSkills.items: React.js, Next.js (Page Router), Redux, Redux Toolkit, Zustand
HTML5, CSS3, Tailwind CSS, Responsive Design
REST APIs, GraphQL (basic understanding), Axios, Strapi CMS, JWT Authentication, Token-based Authorization, Google Places API, Mapbox
Performance Optimization, Code Splitting, Lazy Loading, Caching, Core Web Vitals, SEO Best Practices
Git, GitHub Actions, Docker, Webpack, AWS
